reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del personal del ACA en la oficina.
En la carga de combustible, hay que ser paciente pues en todas las estaciones del ACA, que he visitado últimamente, atienden un auto por playero por vez. O sea hasta que el playero no cobra lo que despachó, no inicia la carga del próximo vehículo.
La atención del playero fue muy amable.
Los baños estaban limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the ACA staff at the office.
When fueling, you have to be patient, as all the ACA stations I've visited recently serve one vehicle at a time. That is, the next vehicle won't be fueled until the gas station attendant collects the amount they've spent.
The gas station attendant's service was very friendly.
The restrooms were clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRNFpIN0x3EAE
